LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S MOTION TO DISMISS THIS INSTANT ACTION AND COMPLAINT FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO OBTAIN A PRE-FILING AS REQUIRED BY CCP 391.7, SUBDIVISION IS DENIED. CCP 391.7 PREVENTS VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS FROM FILING NEW LITIGATION AND NOT PENDING LITIGATION. (SHALANT V. GIRARDI (2011) 51 CAL.4TH 1164, 1171.). DEFENDANT HAS 20 DAYS TO FILE A RESPONSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR # 11604

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S MOTION TO REQUIRE VEXATIOUS LITIGANT MARTIN ENG TO PROVIDE SECURITY PER CCP 391.1 ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND FAILED TO SHOW HOW HE WILL PREVAIL ON MERITS. PLAINTIFF SHALL POST A $40,000 SECURITY TO PROCEED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Continued To May-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Per Ccp 391.1 Et, Seq
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael B. Tannatt, Esq., appearing by courtcall, for defendant JP Morgan Chase Bank. No other appearances.

The moving party appeared. There are no other appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Per Ccp 391.1 et seq. is granted. Plaintiff is declared a vexatious litigant and failed to show how he will prevail on merits. Plaintiff shall post a $40,000 security to proceed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Per Ccp 391.1 Et, Seq

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Continued To Jan-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss This Instant Action And Complaint For Pltf'S Failure To Obtain A Pre-Filing As Required By Ccp 391.7, Subdivision
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARTIN ENG, TEL. NO. 246-1111, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. MICHAEL B. TANNATT OF ALVARADOSMITH, TEL. NO. (213) 229-2400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S Motion To Dismiss This Instant Action And Complaint For Plaintiff's Failure To Obtain A Pre-Filing As Required By CCP 391.7, Subdivision is Denied. CCP 391.7 prevents vexatious litigants from filing new litigation and not pending litigation. (Shalant v. Girardi (2011) 51 Cal.4th 1164, 1171.). DEFENDANT HAS 20 DAYS TO FILE A RESPONSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604 =(302/HEK)
